nodes.name: 印度河
nodes.summary: 印度河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Indian courser、红领绿鹦鹉、黑卷尾等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 红领绿鹦鹉
nodes.summary: 红领绿鹦鹉（Rose-ringed parakeet，学名 Psittacula krameri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于印度河、伊洛瓦底江，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 伊洛瓦底江
nodes.summary: 伊洛瓦底江是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括红领绿鹦鹉、恒河沙百灵，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Rose-ringed parakeets in Grabolino National Park making a beak-lock – a common act in parakeet pairs In Africa, the species occurs in a narrow belt across the full width of the continent between about 4° to 17° N latitude, roughly coinciding with the Sudanian savannas; and in Asia in the Indian subcontinent and Sri Lanka from 6° to 35° N latitude in the foothills of the Himalaya, and from the Indus River valley in Pakistan east to the Irrawaddy River valley in Myanmar. Since the late 20th century, the rose-ringed parakeet has successfully colonised many other countries due to escapes from captivity and deliberate releases
